emails.subject: Gas Daily Options
emails.body: Gas Daily Options Larry, I want to visit with you on ways to improve the online trades for the Gas Daily Options you have been posting. Let me know when you have some time.

emails.body: RE: Gas Daily Options 3 pm today is good. Let me know if you can get a conference room or if I should find one. Bryan and I will be coming from EOL. To: Kyle III, Bill
